title: Classes, Private State, Inheritance, and Composition · Language Lens: Getters Setters
summary: Build maintainable scheduling components with explicit invariants and replaceable policies. Planned artifact: Add and verify the js getters setters increment in a policy-driven scheduling component library. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use accessors for stable property semantics without hiding expensive work or surprising side effects.
Use private fields, static fields, and static blocks without confusing instance and constructor state.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
